description_long: This armchair is constructed from a dark, stone-like material with a jagged, angular silhouette, giving it a menacing and imposing presence. The seat and backrest are accented with glowing orange cracks, reminiscent of molten lava, which add a dramatic and supernatural effect. Three prominent skulls are embedded into the backrest and sides, enhancing its gothic and macabre aesthetic. The armrests are integrated into the angular body, lacking any padding or soft features, and the overall structure appears heavy and monolithic. The surface texture is rough and matte, with the glowing fissures providing stark contrast against the dark stone. This armchair would be fitting as a throne or statement piece in a fantasy or horror-themed urban environment.
description: A dark, stone-like armchair with glowing orange lava cracks and embedded skulls, featuring a rough, angular design and a gothic, supernatural appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, jagged backrest, glowing lava cracks, and two visible skulls embedded in the structure.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid, angular back with no visible decorative features or openings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same jagged profile and skull placements.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the seat, glowing lava cracks, and three skulls prominently set into the backrest and side.
attribute_backrest_style: high, jagged, with embedded skulls and glowing cracks
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, solid block base
attribute_upholstery_pattern: rough stone texture with glowing crack pattern
